B-BEAUTY-0001.prompt:
Subject (피사체): A minimalist derma hyaluronic low-irritation toner in a frosted cylindrical bottle with metallic cap centered on the frame, label facing camera, clean dewy surface detail.
Context (촬영 맥락): Premium Korean beauty advertising for 20대 후반 직장인, 효율 루틴, 출근 전 30초 스킨케어, shot on medium-format digital with 90mm macro lens, f/4, ISO 100.
Composition (구도): 45-degree elevated hero shot with product slightly right of center. 주인공 오브젝트가 화면의 55~65% 차지. 좌측 1/3 수직 여백 (세로 카피 공간).
Lighting (라이팅): controlled studio beauty dish top-lit with black flags side, rim light from back. Subtle catchlight on glass, soft falloff on background.
Color palette (팔레트): glacial mint, porcelain, pewter, sheer azure. Desaturated mids, gentle highlights, skin-safe color profile.
Surface & props (바닥·소품): wet-look black slate with a single water droplet reflection.
Mood & finishing (무드·후보정): editorial skincare campaign, clean retouching, no heavy dodge & burn, natural pore texture retained, no plastic skin, no HDR halo.
Negative (금지): no text, no logo, no watermark, no extra hands, no duplicated bottles, no cartoonish gloss, no oversaturation, no lens distortion.
B-BEAUTY-0001.revised: Premium Korean beauty advertising product photo: minimalist derma hyaluronic low-irritation toner in a frosted cylindrical glass bottle with metallic pewter cap, centered but slightly right of center, label area blank and facing camera (no text/logo). 45-degree elevated hero shot, product occupies 55–65% of frame with vertical copy space on left third. Shot on medium-format digital look, 90mm macro lens, f/4, ISO 100, crisp dewy surface details, subtle condensation. Lighting: controlled studio beauty dish top-lit, black flags on sides for contrast, rim light from behind, subtle catchlight on glass, soft background falloff. Surface: wet-look black slate with a single water droplet reflection near base. Color palette: glacial mint, porcelain, pewter, sheer azure, desaturated midtones and gentle highlights, clean editorial retouching, natural texture, no HDR halo. Background minimal, soft mint-to-porcelain gradient. Negative: no text, no logo, no watermark, no hands, no duplicated bottles, no cartoonish gloss, no oversaturation, no lens distortion.

B-BEAUTY-0002.prompt:
Subject (피사체): A modern K-beauty centella soothing essence in a pastel-mint frosted bottle centered on the frame, label facing camera, clean dewy surface detail.
Context (촬영 맥락): Premium Korean beauty advertising for 30-40 여성, 탄력·광채, 나잇케어, shot on medium-format digital with 90mm macro lens, f/4, ISO 100.
Composition (구도): top-down flat-lay with product center, minimal satellite props around. 주인공 오브젝트가 화면의 55~65% 차지. 상단 1/3 여백 (카피/로고 공간).
Lighting (라이팅): warm tungsten 3200K accent from upper back + neutral 5500K key front. Subtle catchlight on glass, soft falloff on background.
Color palette (팔레트): pale pistachio, off-white, brushed silver, stone gray. Desaturated mids, gentle highlights, skin-safe color profile.
Surface & props (바닥·소품): raw unpolished travertine with faint vein texture.
Mood & finishing (무드·후보정): editorial skincare campaign, clean retouching, no heavy dodge & burn, natural pore texture retained, no plastic skin, no HDR halo.
Negative (금지): no text, no logo, no watermark, no extra hands, no duplicated bottles, no cartoonish gloss, no oversaturation, no lens distortion.
B-BEAUTY-0002.revised: Top-down flat-lay premium Korean skincare advertising photo. Centered modern K-beauty centella soothing essence in a pastel-mint frosted glass bottle, label area blank (no text), facing camera. Bottle occupies ~60% of frame, with clean dewy surface detail and subtle condensation sheen. Minimal satellite props around (brushed silver cap element, small stone-gray pebble, off-white fabric swatch), arranged sparsely, leaving generous empty space in the upper third for copy/logo. Background: raw unpolished travertine stone with faint vein texture in pale pistachio/off-white/stone gray tones. Lighting: warm tungsten 3200K accent from upper back creating gentle rim and glow; neutral 5500K soft key from front for even illumination; subtle catchlight on glass; soft falloff on background. Shot as medium-format digital, 90mm macro, f/4, ISO100, crisp detail, shallow-but-controlled depth. Editorial skincare campaign mood, clean retouch, natural texture, desaturated mids, gentle highlights. Negative: no text, no logo, no watermark, no hands, no duplicated bottles, no cartoonish gloss, no oversaturation, no lens distortion, no HDR halos.
